title: Nachos with Meat and Ranchitas Nacho Queso
ingredients: Half a cup of chopped red onion
Half a cup of chopped cilantro
Half a cup of mozzarella or cheddar cheese for melting
1 family-size bag of Ranchitas Nacho Queso
instructions: Step 1: Season the meat with salt and pepper.
Step 2: Place the tablespoon of oil in a skillet and cook the meat until well done.
Step 3: Add the sofrito and stir well. Then add the water and cook gently until the meat is slightly saucy.
Step 4: Mix the tomato, onion, and cilantro in a bowl. Set aside.
Step 5: Place the Ranchitas Nacho Queso as the base on the plate, then add a generous portion of the meat.
Step 6: Sprinkle the cheese on top and microwave until melted.
Step 7: Remove from microwave and add the tomato, onion, and cilantro mixture on top.
description: Loaded nachos with seasoned ground beef, melted cheese, and all your favorite toppings on top of Ranchitas Nacho Queso.
